overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a continuous walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade through neon-lit plazas, a color-changing LED tunnel, and a gritty graffiti-covered underpass before ascending concrete stairs. The environment features high-tech digital billboards, cyberpunk architecture, and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk next to the water, passing benches and palm trees

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench looking at a device

entered.detail: dark reflective water running alongside the promenade
elevated wooden decking forming the pedestrian walkway
large illuminated advertisement displaying COLA branding
tropical palm tree lining the promenade
massive concrete overpass with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront promenade with a wooden boardwalk alongside a calm canal. Digital billboards and palm trees line the right side while an elevated highway structure looms in the distance. The player walks forward past a seated NPC on a bench, with clear skies and mixed natural-neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with cafe seating and neon facades

events.description: turns right from waterfront promenade into outdoor plaza with cafe seating and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning right into the plaza and walking past outdoor cafe tables with white umbrellas

notable_agents.action: sitting at an outdoor table under a white umbrella

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas shading dining tables
building exterior illuminated with vibrant purple neon lights
yellow and purple checkered tile pattern on the ground

segments.scene_description: The player turns right from the waterfront into a vibrant outdoor dining plaza featuring white umbrellas, checkered pavement, and buildings bathed in purple neon light. Patrons sit at outdoor tables while digital billboards remain visible in the background. The atmosphere shifts from open waterfront to a more enclosed commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian tunnel with programmable LED walls and ceiling

events.description: enters covered walkway with LED walls that cycle through colors
tunnel ambient lighting shifts from cyan to yellow

agents.ego_description: walking through the color-changing tunnel, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking through the tunnel in the opposite direction

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling LED panels displaying shifting colors from purple to cyan to yellow to red
illuminated ceiling panels synchronized with wall colors
large screens showing various advertisements and brand logos

segments.scene_description: The player enters a futuristic enclosed tunnel where the walls and ceiling are composed of LED panels cycling through vibrant colors—purple, cyan, green, yellow, and red. Digital advertisements line the right wall while the player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The environment is completely sheltered from the sky with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty urban underpass with extensive graffiti and scattered debris

events.description: exits color tunnel into open-air underpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the littered underpass toward a concrete staircase, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
wide concrete staircase leading upward to street level
scattered litter including bottles, cans, and cardboard on the ground
large blue industrial dumpster against the wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the color tunnel, the scene transitions to a gritty urban underpass with walls covered in vibrant graffiti. The ground is littered with trash and debris. A concrete staircase becomes visible ahead, leading upward. The space is partially open to the sky above but remains enclosed by high concrete walls with neon accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending from underpass to upper street level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs while passing pedestrians descending

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the underpass

entered.detail: metal railings along both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal handrails and graffiti-covered walls. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs. As the player climbs, futuristic city buildings become visible above, indicating the approach to street level. The transition from the gritty underpass to the upper city is marked by increasing natural light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a serene waterfront promenade into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic city before ascending back toward the street level. It begins along a wooden boardwalk beside a calm canal, passing digital billboards and palm trees under a clear sky. As the camera turns right, the open waterfront gives way to a vibrant outdoor dining plaza with checkered pavement and purple neon lighting, which then leads directly into an enclosed tunnel of cycling LED panels that bathe the surroundings in shifting hues of cyan, green, and red. The scene then shifts from this artificial glow into a gritty, graffiti-covered underpass littered with debris, where the atmosphere becomes more industrial and enclosed. Finally, the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal rails, moving away from the urban decay as the light increases and the towering city skyline opens up above.
